title: cumulant-residual-cert: deterministic bias certificates for charge-neutral fermionic-word observables
description: User-facing Python library for computing deterministic upper bounds on the bias of second-order cumulant truncation, for charge-neutral fermionic-word observables on U(1)-invariant states. Ships five Colab-ready notebooks and optional adapters for PySCF, OpenFermion, and Qiskit-Nature. Apache 2.0.
